name: NPK 20-20-20
notes: General purpose balanced fertilizer. Apply every 2 weeks during growing season.
safety_warning: Wear gloves during application. Keep away from children.

name: Copper Fungicide
notes: Mix with water and spray on affected plants. Apply every 7-10 days.
safety_warning: Avoid contact with skin. Wash hands after use.

name: Neem Oil
notes: Organic fungicide. Spray on leaves in evening. Repeat weekly.
safety_warning: Safe for organic farming. May cause skin irritation.

name: Bordeaux Mixture
notes: Copper-based fungicide. Mix thoroughly before application.
safety_warning: Do not apply during flowering. Wear protective gear.

name: Chlorothalonil
notes: Broad spectrum fungicide. Apply preventively every 7-14 days.
safety_warning: Use only as directed. Requires license in some regions.

name: Mancozeb
notes: Contact fungicide. Apply at first sign of disease.
safety_warning: Avoid inhalation. Use in well-ventilated area.

name: NPK 15-15-15
notes: Balanced fertilizer to strengthen plant immunity.
safety_warning: Apply at soil level. Water after application.

name: Baking Soda Spray
notes: Organic solution. Mix with water and dish soap. Spray weekly.
safety_warning: Completely safe. Food-grade only.

name: Compost Tea
notes: Organic nutrient solution. Dilute 1:10 with water.
safety_warning: Safe for all plants. Enhances soil health.

name: Fish Emulsion
notes: Organic nitrogen source. Apply every 2-3 weeks.
safety_warning: Strong odor. Apply in morning or evening.

name: Seaweed Extract
notes: Growth stimulant. Rich in micronutrients.
safety_warning: Safe and organic. Enhances disease resistance.

name: Potassium Phosphate
notes: Strengthens cell walls. Preventive measure.
safety_warning: Mix well before application.

name: Copper Soap
notes: Organic bactericide. Apply every 5-7 days.
safety_warning: Avoid using on hot days. May cause leaf burn.

name: Streptomycin
notes: Antibiotic spray. Use only when necessary.
safety_warning: Prescription required in many regions. Use sparingly.

name: NPK 10-20-20
notes: High phosphorus for root and fruit development.
safety_warning: Apply at planting and during fruiting.

name: Sulfur Fungicide
notes: Organic fungicide. Good for humid conditions.
safety_warning: Do not apply when temp > 90°F. May harm beneficial insects.

name: Calcium Chloride
notes: Foliar spray to correct calcium deficiency.
safety_warning: Apply in evening. Repeat every 10 days.

name: Gypsum
notes: Soil amendment for calcium. Apply at planting.
safety_warning: Safe for organic farming. Improves soil structure.

name: NPK 5-10-10
notes: Lower nitrogen to reduce foliage. More phosphorus.
safety_warning: Apply at planting and tuber formation.

name: Azoxystrobin
notes: Systemic fungicide. Highly effective.
safety_warning: Professional use recommended. Follow label strictly.

name: Copper Hydroxide
notes: Preventive fungicide. Apply before disease appears.
safety_warning: Organic approved. May stain surfaces.

name: Calcium Nitrate
notes: Strengthens cell walls. Improves storage quality.
safety_warning: Dissolve in water before application.

name: Kelp Meal
notes: Slow release organic fertilizer. Rich in potassium.
safety_warning: Apply at planting. Enhances stress tolerance.

name: Propiconazole
notes: Systemic fungicide for rust diseases.
safety_warning: Agricultural license may be required.

name: NPK 12-12-12
notes: Balanced nutrition to improve resistance.
safety_warning: Split application: half at planting, half at tasseling.

name: Trichoderma
notes: Beneficial fungus. Protects against pathogens.
safety_warning: Organic and safe. Apply to soil or seed.

name: Zinc Sulfate
notes: Micronutrient for healthy growth. Foliar spray.
safety_warning: Essential in alkaline soils.

name: Myclobutanil
notes: Systemic fungicide. Apply from bloom to 6 weeks after.
safety_warning: Follow local regulations.

name: Lime Sulfur
notes: Dormant spray. Apply before bud break.
safety_warning: Strong odor. Wear respirator.

name: Captan
notes: Preventive fungicide. Start at bud break.
safety_warning: Repeat every 7-14 days during wet weather.

name: NPK 8-8-8
notes: Low analysis fertilizer. Safe for fruit trees.
safety_warning: Apply in early spring and after harvest.

name: Dormant Oil
notes: Suffocates overwintering pests and diseases.
safety_warning: Apply in late winter before buds open.

name: Acephate
notes: Insecticide/fungicide. Controls multiple pests.
safety_warning: Do not apply near harvest. Observe waiting period.

name: NPK 5-10-5
notes: Encourages flowering and fruiting.
safety_warning: Apply every 3-4 weeks during growing season.

name: Epsom Salt
notes: Magnesium source. Prevents leaf yellowing.
safety_warning: Completely safe. Foliar spray or soil drench.
